creator: nq1n407ba@disabled.account.local
text:
Created attachment 174221
Stacktrace of crash when printing with printer profile

Possibly related to https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=203223.

I can print pictures directly from darktable if I don't set any profile under "printer". If I do set one, darktable crashes and I get the following message on the console:

Error while reading shared library symbols:
Dwarf Error: wrong version in compilation unit header (is 4, should be 2) [in module /usr/local/lib/gcc48/libgomp.so.1]

A stacktrace is also generated, please find it as attachment.

I am running:

10.3-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p7 #0: Thu Aug 11 18:38:15 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Darktable was last compiled on the 27th August.
